ListItem.Para: Landing gear doors are verified to open using the alternate extend system.
Landing gear control relays operate normally.
Landing gear control solenoids operate normally.
Landing gear control sensors operate normally.
Landing gear control lever switches operate normally.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Verify the landing gear doors open using the alternate extend switch on the flight deck (AMM DDG 32-35-01).

ListItem.Para: Make sure the following circuit breakers located on the P300 panel are closed:
LG ALTN EXT MOTOR REMOTE
LG ALTN EXT CTRL
Install landing gear downlock pins.
Verify the nose and main landing gear doors open using the alternate extend system.
Set Landing Gear Panel (P2-2) ALTN GEAR switch DOWN for 30 seconds.
Confirm that all the landing gear doors open.
If nose landing gear doors do not open, manually move the NLG doors to the open position by hand.

Note.Para: The NLG DOOR CLOSE SNSR status message may be displayed.

ListItem.Para: Close the landing gear doors.
Remove landing gear downlock pins.
Landing gear is secured in the down position.
Alternate extend system is deactivated.
Airplane is dispatched in accordance with the AFM Landing Gear Extended Appendix.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate alternate extend system and secure the landing gear down (AMM DDG 32-35-01).

ListItem.Para: Install landing gear downlock pins (dispatch tool J32011) for airplane flight with landing gear locked in the extended position.
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with an INOP tag:
MLG DOOR CTRL VLV OPEN-1
MLG DOOR CTRL VLV OPEN-2
LG LEVER LOCK
Deactivate the alternate extend system by opening and collaring the following circuit breakers located on the P300 panel:
LG ALTN EXT MOTOR REMOTE
LG ALTN EXT CTRL

Note.Para: The ALTN GEAR EXTEND status message will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: On the MISC SYSTEM CTRLS (MSC) maintenance page, set the Overspeed Warning switch to GEAR DOWN.
The airplane must be dispatched using the AFM Landing Gear Extended appendix.
Determine flight planning information by selecting Gear Down Dispatch in the Boeing performance software.

Note.Para: The FMC does not support certain provisions for operations with the landing gear extended.
Use Boeing Onboard Performance Tool (OPT) to determine take-off weight and/or landing weight as it affects aircraft performance.

ListItem.Para: VMO GEAR DOWN memo message will be displayed.
RVSM operations is not allowed.
The takeoff speeds and VREF obtained from the FMC are not valid for dispatch with the landing gear extended.
